---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for DockRx
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## 💡 Feature Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you're proposing. -->

## 🎯 Problem It Solves

<!-- What problem does this feature address? Who benefits from it? -->
<!-- e.g. "As a patient, I can't see the doctor's rating before booking, so I don't know which doctor to choose." -->

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented. Be as specific as possible. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? -->

## 📍 Which Part of the App Does This Affect?

- [ ] Frontend (Patient App)
- [ ] Admin Panel
- [ ] Backend API
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## 📸 Mockups / Examples

<!-- If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or examples from other apps that illustrate your idea. -->

## 📊 Priority / Impact

<!-- How important is this feature to you? Who else would benefit? -->

- [ ] 🔴 High — Critical for core workflow
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — Improves usability significantly
- [ ] 🟢 Low — Nice to have

## 📝 Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. -->
